claim: ChatGPT can accept PDFs and multiple file types for analysis, not just text inputs, making it versatile for document processing tasks
actionable: Use ChatGPT's file upload feature to analyze PDFs, documents, or spreadsheets directly without manual transcription
source_title: Every AI Model Explained in 20 Minutes

claim: Claude excels at work tasks (Excel modification, Word document writing, data analysis) compared to ChatGPT, though both support these features
actionable: For productivity work tasks like spreadsheet analysis or document editing, prefer Claude over ChatGPT
source_title: Every AI Model Explained in 20 Minutes

claim: Gemini uniquely ingests and analyzes video content frame-by-frame, answering specific questions about any frame - no other frontier model has this capability
actionable: Use Google Gemini when you need to extract information from video or ask questions about specific scenes
source_title: Every AI Model Explained in 20 Minutes

claim: Grok's main strength is real-time Twitter/X search and trend analysis; it underperforms frontier models on general tasks
actionable: Use Grok specifically for Twitter/X research and real-time information gathering; use other models for general tasks
source_title: Every AI Model Explained in 20 Minutes

claim: Running open-source models locally provides privacy and control but requires more technical setup and models underperform frontier hosted versions
actionable: Choose local open-source models only if privacy is critical; otherwise use frontier APIs which are cheaper and better quality
source_title: Every AI Model Explained in 20 Minutes

claim: For 95% of use cases, open-source models are sufficient even though frontier models are more capable
actionable: Assess your specific use case before defaulting to frontier models; open-source models often meet real-world requirements at lower cost
source_title: Every AI Model Explained in 20 Minutes

claim: Cursor is the best AI coding assistant, beating competitors on ease of use and feature integration
actionable: Use Cursor as your primary AI coding assistant for the best developer experience
